name: Coda
auth_notes: Authentication is performed using API tokens generated in the user's account settings, used as Bearer tokens in headers.
mcp_notes: Coda provides an official MCP server specifically optimized for LLM usage patterns.
access_notes: The Coda API is available to all users free of charge, in both free and paid workspaces, via account-generated tokens.

evidence.claim: The Coda API is a RESTful API that allows programmatic interaction with docs, tables, and rows.
Search citation: Coda: Your all-in-one collaborative workspace.
Search citation: Getting Started Guide: Coda API

api_notes: The REST API covers core doc management, including listing docs, and reading/writing table data (rows, tables, formulas). It does not currently support full-text search across all content.
one_liner: Coda is a collaborative workspace platform that combines elements of documents, spreadsheets, and applications into a single canvas.
